title: Maximum Length of a Concatenated String with Unique Characters
titleCn: 串联字符串的最大长度

testcases.input: arr = ["un","iq","ue"] Output: 4 Explanation: All the valid concatenations are: - "" - "un" - "iq" - "ue" - "uniq" ("un" + "iq") - "ique" ("iq" + "ue") Maximum length is 4.
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: All the valid concatenations are: - "" - "un" - "iq" - "ue" - "uniq" ("un" + "iq") - "ique" ("iq" + "ue") Maximum length is 4.

testcases.input: arr = ["cha","r","act","ers"] Output: 6 Explanation: Possible longest valid concatenations are "chaers" ("cha" + "ers") and "acters" ("act" + "ers").
testcases.expectedOutput: 6 Explanation: Possible longest valid concatenations are "chaers" ("cha" + "ers") and "acters" ("act" + "ers").

testcases.input: arr = ["abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz"] Output: 26 Explanation: The only string in arr has all 26 characters.
testcases.expectedOutput: 26 Explanation: The only string in arr has all 26 characters.
